title: Lab: Repair an Emergency Volunteer Application
summary: Lab: Repair an Emergency Volunteer Application retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar state timing and selector-scope incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css action pseudo classes, css structural pseudo classes, css form state pseudo classes, css functional pseudo classes, css pseudo elements in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar state timing and selector-scope incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Unfamiliar state timing and selector-scope incident case 1: put every interaction style under hover because browsers synthesize hover on all devices.

Unfamiliar state timing and selector-scope incident case 1: define each state from its actual input or navigation condition, keep focus visible, and test pointer, touch, keyboard, and fragment navigation separately.
Unfamiliar state timing and selector-scope incident case 1: remove focus outlines when an element also has an active state.
